title: Processes and apparatus for preparation of separators of electrochemical devices
abstract: A process and an apparatus (100) for preparing a separator (107) for an electrochemical device are disclosed. The process comprises coating a first side of a porous base membrane (101) with a first coating slurry and coating a second side of the porous base membrane (101) with a second coating slurry to obtain a coated membrane (103) having a wet coating layer; immersing the coated membrane (103) having a wet coating layer in a water bath (130) to obtain a coated membrane (105) having a solvent-reduced coating layer; and drying the coated membrane (105) having a solvent-reduced coating layer.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) AĂ‚Â processĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â preparingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â separatorĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â electrochemicalĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â comprising: coatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â sideĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â porousĂ‚Â baseĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â slurryĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â sideĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â porousĂ‚Â baseĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â slurryĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â coatedĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â wetĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â layer,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â slurryĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â slurryĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â polymerĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â organicĂ‚Â solvent,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â organicĂ‚Â solventĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â miscibleĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â partiallyĂ‚Â miscibleĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â water; immersingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â coatedĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â wetĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â layerĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â waterĂ‚Â bathĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â temperatureĂ‚Â rangingĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â 10Ă¢Â„ÂƒĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â 40Ă¢Â„ÂƒĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â coatedĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â solvent-reducedĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â layer;Ă‚Â and dryingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â coatedĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â solvent-reducedĂ‚Â coatingĂ‚Â layerĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â separator.
